notes: Added the production ClipboardService actor at Kizba/Infrastructure/Clipboard/ClipboardService.swift conforming to the existing ClipboardServicing protocol. Each copy mints a fresh UUID token, writes verbatim through a narrow internal PasteboardAdapter, snapshots the post-write changeCount, and schedules a detached Task that requests a clear after the configured Duration. The actor's gate clears the pasteboard only if the requesting token still matches currentToken AND the live changeCount equals the snapshot — otherwise the clear is a no-op. Newer copies cancel the previous pending clear-task as a courtesy. Production wiring uses the internal SystemPasteboardAdapter backed by NSPasteboard.general (guarded by #if canImport(AppKit), hops to MainActor). Logging via Log.clipboard records only sanctioned shape-only metadata (copy occurred, clear performed, clear skipped: token superseded / changeCount diverged); the copied value is never logged. Added 5 deterministic XCTest cases in KizbaTests/ClipboardServiceTests.swift driving the full timeline through a file-private FakeClipboard PasteboardAdapter double — no real NSPasteboard access. The local FakeClipboard is private (file-scope) so it does not collide with the unrelated FakeClipboard doubles in DomainProtocolsTests / EntryDetailModelRefinementTests (which conform to ClipboardServicing, not PasteboardAdapter). project.pbxproj unchanged (PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup auto-picks the new files). No changes to AppEnvironment, ClipboardServicing, or any other module.
commits: feat(clipboard): add ClipboardService with token+changeCount auto-clear
